news.headline: Iron ore’s China problem is affecting the world’s largest miners.
Investment firm Tybourne will return external capital from long-only funds as part of its strategy.
Harbour BioMed and Insilico Medicine partner to advance AI-driven antibody discovery and development globally.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Harbour BioMed, a leading biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Cambridge, Mass., with offices in Rotterdam, Netherlands and Shanghai, announced its dedication to discovering, developing, and commercializing innovative antibody therapeutics in the field of immunology. The company, listed as HKEX: 02142, aims to make a global impact in this sector.

news.headline: IDEX Biometrics lands first Visa program in MEA for 10,000 units, marking breakthrough in biometric bank card market.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on 20 February 2025, a prominent company specializing in smart card technology, security, and ID services in the MEA region has made a significant production order of 10,000 units to IDEX Biometrics. This order is intended to facilitate Visa's biometric bank card initiatives in one of the rapidly developing payment markets within the region. It signifies the introduction of the initial Visa program in the market utilizing the IDEX Pay biometric technology solution. The partner of IDEX Biometrics caters to a broad clientele, including over 500 banks, governments, and corporations globally.

news.headline: Swiss digital asset bank critiques traditional finance, pointing out how crypto ETFs are impacted.
news.summary: The digital asset bank from Switzerland is contesting the widespread support for crypto ETFs, pointing out the constraints of traditional finance.

news.headline: EMA validates application for Aspaveli® extension to treat C3G and primary IC-MPGN, announced by Sobi® and Apellis Pharmaceuticals.
news.summary: Sobi® and Apellis Pharmaceuticals unveiled today that the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has accepted an application to extend the indications for Aspaveli® (pegcetacoplan). This expanded indication is for treating C3 glomerulopathy (C3G) and primary immune complex disorders. The announcement was made on Feb. 20, 2025.

news.headline: Upgraded private terminal at Heathrow called Windsor caters exclusively to VIPs for seamless travel experience.
news.summary: A recent report unveils a sharp rise in new COVID-19 cases in the United States, with over 100,000 confirmed cases recorded in the past week alone. This surge marks a significant increase compared to the previous weeks, indicating a concerning trend in the spread of the virus. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to curb the escalation of infections. The current total number of confirmed cases in the country has surpassed 10 million, with a death toll exceeding 240,000. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and implementing measures to contain the virus's spread.

news.headline: China Foreign Ministry, on US' Rubio skipping G20 meeting: Regarding the relevant decisions of the US side, the Chinese side will not comment on it
AB Electrolux has released its 2024 Annual Report on Feb. 20, 2025. It is available in Swedish and English on their website.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the AB Electrolux Annual Report for 2024 was released on the company's website. Both Swedish and English versions of the report can be accessed in pdf-format on www.electroluxgroup.com. The report includes important data on the company's performance in 2024.

news.headline: China Commerce Ministry: It is hoped that the European side will heed the industry's calls and promote bilateral investment cooperation through dialogue and consultation.
China Commerce Ministry: China has been doing its best to push for negotiations with the EU
Hotel & Shop Plus 2025 event in Shanghai features leading suppliers showcasing latest products for hotels, restaurants, and shopping malls. #SymbioticInnovation
news.summary: On February 20, 2025 in Shanghai, an event called Hotel & Shop Plus, put together by IM Sinoexpo, is bringing together top suppliers in the construction and operation industry to showcase their newest offerings for hotels, restaurants, and shopping malls. This event aims to highlight the latest products, services, and innovations in this sector.

news.headline: Former SNB Chief Jordan joins Zurich Insurance board, per Bloomberg.
China Foreign Ministry: Deputy PM and foreign minister of New Zealand will visit China from February 25th to 27th.
Indivior reports financial results for FY and Q4 2024, ending Dec 31, 2024. Available on www.indivior.com.
news.summary: In Slough, UK and Richmond, Virginia, on February 20, 2025, Indivior PLC (Nasdaq/LSE: INDV) revealed its financial outcomes for the period concluding on December 31, 2024. Detailed financial information, an investor presentation, and a webcast can be accessed on the company's website at www.indivior.com. For more regarding the earnings report, please visit the provided website.

news.headline: CellPoint Digital collaborates with Air Europa to enhance payment processes and offer more Alternative Payment Methods to travelers.
news.summary: In a recent development on February 20, 2025, Air Europa has announced a partnership with CellPoint Digital. This collaboration aims to streamline Air Europa's payment procedures and enhance the variety of Alternative Payment Methods (APMs) accessible to customers. CellPoint Digital, a prominent provider of payment solutions to airlines worldwide, will assist Air Europa in this endeavor, helping to offer a more diverse range of payment options to travelers.

news.headline: SAP recommends dividend of €2.35 per share for FY 2024, up by €0.15 (6.8%) from previous year.
news.summary: In Walldorf, Germany, on February 20, 2025, SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) announced a recommended dividend of €2.35 per share for fiscal year 2024. This represents a 6.8% increase, or €0.15 more than the dividend distributed for fiscal year 2023. The Supervisory Board and Executive Board have urged shareholders to vote in favor of this proposed dividend payout.

news.headline: SEQUESTO partners with RevSparkAI to enhance RFP response with AI technology, solidifying its global position. Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Transforming the way RFP responses are handled, the AI technology pioneer SEQUESTO based in BEVEREN, Belgium, announced on Feb. 20, 2025, a significant collaboration with RevSparkAI. SEQUESTO, known for its top AI platform for streamlining RFP responses, is joining forces with RevSparkAI, renowned for its expertise in data-driven business solutions. This partnership aims to combine SEQUESTO's cutting-edge AI technology with RevSparkAI's industry-leading strategies to revolutionize RFP response processes. The move is set to bolster efficiency and effectiveness, leveraging the strengths of both companies.

KN to present unaudited financial results for 2024 in webinar on Feb 28, 2025 at 11:00 am EET. Open to shareholders, investors, analysts.
news.summary: On February 28th, 2025, KN is hosting an investor conference webinar at 11:00 am EET. Shareholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders are welcome to attend. The presentation will be conducted in English.

news.summary: The content in this document should not be disseminated, published, or distributed in or to Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, or the United States, or to any citizen of these countries.

news.headline: AS Tallink Grupp to reveal Q4 and 12-month results for 2024 in Investor Webinar today at 12:00 (EEST). Email questions by 11:00 am to investor@tallink.ee.
news.summary: AS Tallink Grupp will announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 during an Investor Webinar scheduled for today at 12:00 (EEST). Participants can join the webinar through the provided link. Questions should be submitted by 11:00 am via email to: investor@tallink.ee. Additional information can be found in a previously released statement.

news.headline: EMA validates indication extension app for Aspaveli® for C3G and primary IC-MPGN by Apellis & Sobi, rare chronic kidney diseases with no treatments.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, and Stockholm, Sweden, on February 20, 2025, Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: APLS) and Sobi® (STO:SOBI) jointly announced that the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has approved the validation of an application for extending the indication of Aspaveli® (pegcetacoplan). This extension applies to the treatment of C3 glomerulopathy (C3G) and primary immune complex membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis (IC-MPGN), two rare chronic kidney conditions currently without approved treatments.

news.headline: Pulsar Helium to conduct down-hole testing at Jetstream Appraisal Wells, Topaz Project in Minnesota, USA. This news is restricted from certain countries.
news.summary: The following announcement and information provided are limited and should not be released, published, or distributed, in whole or in part, directly or indirectly, in the United States, Australia, Japan, or the Republic of South Africa. It should also not be transmitted, distributed, or sent to, or by, any national, resident, or citizen of these countries or any jurisdiction where such actions may violate local securities laws or regulations.

news.headline: Waterdrop partners with DeepSeek to revolutionize insurance services with AI, marking a strategic integration.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Waterdrop Inc. disclosed the integration of DeepSeek, a crucial move for the company. Waterdrop, known for its focus on insurance and healthcare services, operates as a prominent technology platform. Listed on the NYSE as WDH, the company's decision signifies a big leap towards its strategic goals. This decision underlines Waterdrop's commitment to enhancing its services and expanding its societal influence.

news.headline: Equinor ASA (EQNR) declared USD 0.35/share ordinary and extraordinary cash dividends each for Q3 2024.
news.summary: Equinor ASA (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) disclosed on October 24, 2024, that it will be distributing a regular cash dividend of USD 0.35 per share and an additional cash dividend of USD 0.35 per share for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Paratus Energy Services Ltd. in Hamilton, Bermuda, commences a $20 million share buyback program (Oslo: PLSV).
news.summary: In an announcement made today in Hamilton, Bermuda, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (Oslo: PLSV) has officially initiated its share buyback program. The Company plans to repurchase shares totaling around $20 million as part of this program.

news.headline: Trump, when asked about a new trade deal with China: It is possible
Cnova NV released their fiscal year 2024 earnings and 4th quarter 2024 activity announcement.
KuCoin's Alicia Kao moderates Web3 panel at Hackseason by Metaverse Post in Hong Kong on Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Hong Kong at Hackseason, a notable event organized by Metaverse Post (MPost) took place. During this event, Alicia Kao, the Managing Director of KuCoin, led an engaging panel discussion titled "Where is Web3 Headed in 2025." The session attracted a significant number of attendees and sparked discussions on the future direction of Web3 technologies.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric will implement organizational changes and new executive officers on April 1, 2025. (100)
news.summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corporation based in Tokyo revealed today its upcoming organizational modifications and adjustments in key executives, as well as changes to the executive officer system and responsibilities, set to take effect on April 1, 2025. These modifications were approved during a special meeting of the Board of Directors. Additionally, the company disclosed the selection of new Executive Officers (Associate) who will assume their roles on the same date. Mitsubishi Electric Corporation's stock symbol is 6503.

news.headline: Dubai Internet City contributes AED 100 billion to Dubai's economy with over 125,000 tech jobs created.
news.summary: An impact assessment has been conducted to analyze the influence of the main tech center in the region and the birthplace of worldwide AI innovators on the digital economy since its inception. The report, created in partnership with Accenture, reveals that over 125,000 technology positions have been created thanks to TECOM Group's contributions.

news.headline: Strong financial growth expected in 2024. Company introduces DKK 2.5 billion share buyback scheme.
Mercedes-Benz (MBG) reports strong financial results in 2024, unveils roadmap for growth and resilience.
news.summary: In Germany, Mercedes-Benz Group AG (MBG) announced strong financial performance for 2024 and introduced a strategic plan to boost the company's resilience. Despite a tough market, MBG's solid results were attributed to excellent products and cost control. To enhance competitiveness in an unpredictable industry, MBG revealed a multi-year enhancement plan. The company, listed as MBG, is optimistic about navigating challenges and sustaining growth.

news.headline: Nilfisk's Q4 & FY2024 results show improved EBITDA before special items due to organic growth & margin expansion.
Viridien and Matnex have joined forces to speed up AI-driven materials exploration and innovation.
ISS begins buyback program worth DKK 2.5 billion.
French Minister: Macron is going to Washington next week
FLSmidth's 2024 annual report reveals increased profits and significant advancements in transformation initiatives.
2 million Australians may influence the upcoming Australian election with their cryptocurrency voting preferences, reveals a recent YouGov poll.
news.summary: Results from a recent YouGov poll indicate that approximately 2 million individuals in Australia may come together to create a voting bloc in favor of cryptocurrency. This bloc could potentially have a significant impact on the upcoming federal election scheduled for May.

news.headline: Javier Milei-backed LIBRA creator allegedly withdrew $99 million in liquidity, causing traders to lose over $250 million.
news.summary: The scandal-ridden LIBRA token experienced a withdrawal of around $99 million in invested liquidity by entities associated with its creator, as revealed by blockchain research firm Chainalysis. The firm uncovered eight cryptocurrency wallets linked to the creator team that removed funds from the token's liquidity pool. While Chainalysis was unable to verify the owners' identities, it noted that these wallets had directly received tokens from the LIBRA creator. Benzinga has reached out to Chainalysis for more details on the withdrawals. For updates on this developing story, stay tuned.

news.headline: VDMA urges policymakers to boost Europe's robotics industry competitiveness to combat global decline.
news.summary: In Frankfurt, Germany, VDMA Robotics + Automation, the primary networking organization for the robotics sector in Europe, has urged for immediate action to prevent the decline in global competitiveness of European economies. Dr. Dietmar Ley, the Chairman of VDMA Robotics + Automation, highlighted the pressing issue stating that European industries are lagging in international competitiveness and must strive to regain ground. He pointed out that countries like China have been emphasizing advanced technology and high-value manufacturing, posing a challenge for Europe. These comments were made in the context of a call to address this issue and ensure the sustainability and growth of European industries.

news.headline: Brazil authorizes first XRP ETF, as bank considers launching BBRL stablecoin on XRPL for institutional clients.
news.summary: Initially, the BBRL stablecoin will be exclusively offered to institutional clients. However, the bank has significant ambitions for growth and aims to widen its availability in the future.

news.headline: SBM Offshore reports Full Year 2024 earnings of $2.5 billion, a 10% increase from the previous year.
Economist Craig Shapiro rejects Trump's plan to give 20% of DOGE savings to public, insists all savings must reduce debt/inflation.
news.summary: President Trump proposed using 20% of potential savings from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) for payouts to Americans and another 20% to reduce national debt. Economist Craig Shapiro argues that all savings should be dedicated to reducing deficits, debt, and controlling inflation. Shapiro warned that Trump's proposal could hinder efforts to curb inflation and lower borrowing costs. Trump's plan was discussed at a Saudi-backed investment summit in Miami, with Shapiro emphasizing the need to prioritize financial stability. Shapiro's concern is that this plan could have negative consequences for inflation control and interest rates. President Trump is considering this plan, which has generated mixed reactions.

news.headline: In 2025, a key figure predicts AI and blockchain synergy to revolutionize tech with robotics, AR, and VR.
news.summary: Christian Thompson, the managing director of the Sui Foundation, is optimistic about the integration of AI agents with blockchains. He also foresees significant growth in robotics, augmented reality (AR), and virtual reality (VR) technologies. Thompson believes these advancements present exciting opportunities for innovation and development in the near future.

news.headline: XRP price surges as SEC recognizes Canary Capital & Wisdom Tree XRP ETF filings. Rumors of Ripple's legal battle delay.
news.summary: The price of XRP has surged after the SEC acknowledged several filings related to XRP and amid speculation of a possible postponement in Ripple's legal dispute with the agency.
